compressed_prompt: draft a resume for a first-time job seeker with 12 placeholders like [name], [address], [skills], no commas in formal tone
response:
# RESUME

---

**[FULL NAME]**
[HOME ADDRESS] | [PHONE NUMBER] | [EMAIL ADDRESS]

---

## OBJECTIVE

A motivated and dedicated individual seeking an entry-level position at [COMPANY NAME] to apply academic knowledge and contribute meaningfully to the growth and success of the organization.

---

## EDUCATION

**[DEGREE OR DIPLOMA NAME]**
[SCHOOL OR UNIVERSITY NAME]
Year of Graduation: [GRADUATION YEAR]

---

## SKILLS

[LIST OF RELEVANT SKILLS]

---

## EXTRACURRICULAR ACTIVITIES AND ACHIEVEMENTS

* Actively participated in school and community events
* Demonstrated leadership and teamwork in group projects
* Received recognition for academic and personal accomplishments

---

## VOLUNTEER OR INTERNSHIP EXPERIENCE

**[VOLUNTEER OR INTERNSHIP ROLE]**
Organization or Institution Name
* Assisted team members with assigned responsibilities
* Gained practical exposure to professional work environments
* Developed communication and problem-solving abilities

---

## REFERENCES

Available upon request

---

*This resume contains the following placeholders to be filled in:*
1. Full Name
2. Home Address
3. Phone Number
4. Email Address
5. Company Name
6. Degree or Diploma Name
7. School or University Name
8. Graduation Year
9. List of Relevant Skills
10. Volunteer or Internship Role
11. Organization or Institution Name
12. Additional Reference Contact
